title: Personal Config (v1)
description: Identity of the person using this harness. Lives at ~/.claude/local/personal.config.json (never committed). Used to personalize log output, git commit attribution, and timezone-aware behavior without leaking identity into harness-layer files.

preferred_name.description: Display name used in logs and session output. Not committed to git.

noreply_email.description: Email address used for git commit attribution. Prefer a GitHub no-reply address (see examples/personal.config.example.json for the format) to avoid leaking a real address into public commit history.

timezone.description: IANA timezone identifier (e.g. America/Los_Angeles, Europe/London). Optional — defaults to the system timezone when omitted.
